track_record.visibility_markdown:
## M-1 Outcomes

Observational — settlement tracking; registered verdict metric is excess CLV.
Outcome denominator basis: PA-valid settled player-market rows only; zero-PA and absent-boxscore rows are VOID.
Retroactive-grading note: CLV sign is rendered from captured closes where available; this is report visibility only.

### 2026-07-21 settlements

| Market | Picks | Hits | Hit rate | Avg implied prob at pick |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | 44 | 5 | 11.4% | 19.2% |
| Hits | 61 | 36 | 59.0% | 56.1% |
| HR | 46 | 7 | 15.2% | 14.9% |
| Total bases | 76 | 30 | 39.5% | 45.4% |

HR subgroup (secondary only; no HR-specific verdict): matched-close coverage=46/46 (100.0%); unmatched=0.

#### CLV-sign split

| Market | CLV bucket | Picks | Hits | Hit rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | negative/flat CLV | 33 | 4 | 12.1% |
| Doubles | positive CLV | 11 | 1 | 9.1% |
| Hits | negative/flat CLV | 42 | 25 | 59.5% |
| Hits | positive CLV | 17 | 10 | 58.8% |
| HR | negative/flat CLV | 23 | 4 | 17.4% |
| HR | positive CLV | 23 | 3 | 13.0% |
| Total bases | negative/flat CLV | 52 | 22 | 42.3% |
| Total bases | positive CLV | 22 | 8 | 36.4% |

Positive-CLV-and-hit names: Daylen Lile — Doubles 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Brandon Nimmo — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; CJ Abrams — Hits 1.5 @ DraftKings; George Springer — Hits 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Jake Burger — Hits 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Jo Adell — Hits 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Jorge Soler — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; Justin Foscue — Hits 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Kyle Stowers — Hits 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Ryan Jeffers — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; Wyatt Langford — Hits 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Max Muncy — HR 0.5 @ BetRivers; Ryan Jeffers — HR 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Shea Langeliers — HR 0.5 @ BetMGM; Fernando Tatis Jr. — Total bases 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Francisco Lindor — Total bases 1.5 @ Bally Bet; George Springer — Total bases 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Joe Mack — Total bases 0.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Kyle Stowers — Total bases 1.5 @ Hard Rock Bet; Manny Machado — Total bases 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Michael Harris II — Total bases 1.5 @ BetMGM; Wyatt Langford — Total bases 1.5 @ Fanatics.
